creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 194231
py-tox-3.0.0-DOCS.patch

(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #5)

Thank you for the detailed explanations and insights. I really appreciate that.

Attached is a rebased patch with the DOCS option. The builds are fine so far and with the DOCS option enabled, there are 7 warnings (related to devel/py-pluggy + devel/py-py) during the build.l

The test results are:

With Python 2.7:

> 368 passed, 4 skipped, 1 xfailed (due a bug as noted in the results) in 45.71 seconds

With Python 3.6:

> 369 passed, 3 skipped, 1 xfailed (due a bug as noted in the result) in 57.34 seconds

If the problems with the packages "packaging" and "simple" still persist in some way it would be no problem for me to leave the port at its current state without the DOCS option. (Although it's always quite handy to have some reference if you're travelling or your ISP let you down.)
